temporal_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a man with short, graying hair, wearing a gray suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt. He has a serious and concerned expression as he looks off-camera to his left. The setting is dimly lit with a cool, greenish-blue color palette. In the background, framed pictures with what appears to be calligraphy hang on a tiled wall. A bright, rectangular light fixture is visible on the left. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's subtle movements and expressions. The audio begins with a man speaking a short, slightly hesitant phrase in Mandarin, "Oh oh," as if reacting to something unexpected. His tone is one of mild surprise or concern. Immediately following his words, a sharp, electronic beep, like a notification from a device, cuts through the quiet atmosphere. The scene cuts to an extreme close-up of a silver Motorola flip phone. The phone's small screen is illuminated, displaying a message notification. The text on the screen includes Chinese characters and the numbers "454870." The brand name "MOTOROLA" is visible above the screen. The background is completely dark, isolating the phone. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the top left corner. The camera is static, tightly framed on the phone's display. This is quickly followed by the start of a tense, electronic music track. The music has a driving, rhythmic beat and a suspenseful, modern feel, creating a mood of anticipation and intrigue that builds in intensity.
